calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.

Dept. 514, Judge: Doanld J. Sullivan Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: S. Wong #11288.
Petitioner ANH SAI TRUONG, mother was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor THANH TRIEN TANG and YEN BUU TANG.

Cantonese interpreter Jenny Yau and petiotioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father LOI QUOC TANG was not present, but consented to the name change of the minor by way of declaration file 1-24-12.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to JIMMY TANG and MIMI TANG.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
